Re-adjudication Request for Claim Invoice 73612
Patient: FATMA ALI AL MUBARK (MRN: 23337)
Visit Date: 2026-01-31 00:00:00
Diagnosis: J20.8-Acute bronchitis due to other specified organisms

MEDICATION NOT REGISTERED (1 line(s)):
  The medications listed below were clinically necessary for patient care.
  These medications are approved by SFDA and were administered under physician
  supervision based on established clinical protocols.
  Request: Review and approve based on clinical necessity and SFDA registration status.
  - Seq 13: 99999999999999 - ATROVENT 500MCG-2ML UDV (SOLUTION FOR INHALATION) / 0.25 mg/ml / 2ml x 20 (SAR 2.11)

MISSING DOCUMENTS (1 line(s)):
  Required documentation has been compiled and is attached/available.
  Request: Re-evaluate with the provided documentation.
  - Seq 10: MOHS-AB114 - SGOT/AST U84450 (SAR 96.92)

TARIFF ADJUSTMENT (7 line(s), total difference: 0.07 SAR):
  The rejected amounts represent rounding differences of 0.01 SAR per line item.
  Per the agreed tariff schedule between Hayat National Hospital-ABHA and
  Ministry of Health, these amounts are within the contractual tolerance.
  Request: Accept the claimed amounts as per the agreed tariff rates.
